title: JoJoPack
body:
### Requires Optifine
### Or: EMF for mobs, CIT Resewn for items

![A showcase of all the custom mobs. There are seven in total; three dogs, a cat, a tortoise, a bird, and a Stand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f221b718f940f8978f52461ae37604c79642c6a.png)

I've been messing around with resource packs for a very long time but this is my first public one. Replaces certain mobs when named.


Currently included:

[Danny](https://jojowiki.com/Danny) from Part 1 (Wolf)

[Iggy](https://jojowiki.com/Iggy) & [Pet Shop](https://jojowiki.com/Pet_Shop) from Part 3 (Wolf and parrot)

[Coco Jumbo](https://jojowiki.com/Coco_Jumbo) from Part 5 (Turtle)

[Tusk ACT 1](https://jojowiki.com/Tusk) from Part 7 (Allay)

[Iwasuke](https://jojowiki.com/Iwasuke) from Part 8 (Wolf)

[Wild Cat Size](https://jojowiki.com/Wild_Cat_Size) from Part 9 (Cats)

Coffee gum item from Part 3 (Bone)

Wild Cat Size and all three dogs have a chance to spawn naturally.

Tested with Forge and OptiFabric

<details>
<summary>Mob Info</summary>
  
Wild Cat Size spawn as a variant of Siamese cats.
  
All three dogs have a 1:6 chance of naturally spawning in their respective biomes:

  **Iggy** - Savanna Plateau and Wooded Badlands
  
  **Danny** - Taiga and Forest
  
  **Iwasuke** - Old Growth Pine/Spruce Taiga
  
  Danny has 2 variants: one with upright ears, based on his manga and anime appearance, and one with longer, floppy ears based on the film. Both have an equal chance to spawn.

### Accepted Names (Names aren't case-sensitive):

**Wolves:**

iggy, iggi

danny, dani

iwasuke, rocky

**Parrots:**

pet shop, ps, petshop

**Turtles:**

coco jumbo, coco jambo, coco jamboo, cj, mr. president

**Cats:**

wild cat size, cat size, charming, morrissey, catsize, cs, wcs

**Allays:**

tusk, act 1, act1, chumimin

**(Extra items)**

Bone:

Pretty much any combination of "coffee" and "gum"


  

  

</details>

[Mirror (Planet Minecraft)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/jojopack-mobs-from-jojo-s-bizarre-adventure-cem/)
